name: Elva's Carne Guisada
recipeIngredient: 2 chuck roasts (for 12 people), trimmed and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from the meat and cut into small, bite-sized cubes.
2. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
3. Add the meat to the pot and cook until it absorbs most of the liquid but is not dry.
4. Sprinkle flour evenly over the meat and brown well, stirring occasionally.
5. Add spices (cumin and pepper), garlic, Ro-Tel tomatoes, chopped onion, and bell pepper.
6. Pour in 1 cup of water and stir to combine all ingredients.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
8. Serve the carne guisada hot or at room temperature.
